# Test that time advances through different phases during travel.
# Starts at Morning. Many round-trips should advance through
# Midday, Afternoon, Dusk, Night, Midnight, Dawn, and back.

/status

# Round-trip Kilteevan <-> Crossroads <-> Pub (many times)
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan

/status

# Even more trips to push through more phases
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan
go to crossroads
go to pub
go to crossroads
go to kilteevan

/status
/quit
